overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit Night City market district at night. The character walks through covered food stalls, enters a small shop, traverses wet plazas with holographic advertisements, and navigates dark back alleys before approaching a large MARK 24 sign and ascending stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food market with neon signage

events.description: approaching food stall with visible steam and vendor preparing food

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market arcade past food vendors and neon signs

notable_agents.action: vendor working at food stall, preparing items behind the counter
pedestrian in bright pink shirt walking past the stall

entered.detail: large purple neon sign spelling BEER with arrow
glass display counter with food items and condiments
tall red vending machine with digital display
metal and fabric roof structure covering the market walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered night market with wet pavement reflecting purple and blue neon lights. A food stall with a glass counter occupies the center, tended by a vendor, while a large BEER neon sign glows in the background. Pedestrians in cyberpunk attire walk through the semi-enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: small retail shop with shelves and merchandise

events.description: entering indoor shop through bead curtain doorway
exiting shop back to outdoor street area

agents.ego_description: enters a small shop, looks around at merchandise on shelves, then exits back to the street

notable_agents.action: shopkeeper in turquoise tank top standing near shelves, looking at phone

entered.detail: green beaded curtain marking shop entrance
wall-mounted shelves with vases and merchandise
stacked blue cardboard boxes on the floor
red neon sign shaped like a tulip flower

segments.scene_description: The character steps through a beaded curtain into a small dimly lit shop with wooden shelves holding various items and boxes stacked on the floor. A shopkeeper stands near the back looking at a device. After a brief look around, the character exits back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: transitioning from narrow shop entrance to open pedestrian plaza
moving into area with bright neon reflections on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking and occasionally running through open plaza with wet streets reflecting neon lights

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through the plaza

entered.detail: wet asphalt reflecting pink and blue neon lights
large holographic billboard displaying advertisements
bright neon signage with Japanese characters
fabric awning over shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza with wet streets that mirror the vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements overhead. Various pedestrians walk through the area, and the camera moves through puddles reflecting the cyberpunk city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back alley with graffiti and debris

events.description: entering darker narrow alleyway with reduced lighting
passing by wall with large colorful tiger graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow dark alley with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair walking past camera
group of pedestrians walking toward camera in the distance

entered.detail: large wall mural of a tiger face with red and green colors
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above
scattered garbage and debris along the alley wall
metal safety railing along a lower level drop

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow, dimly lit alley with concrete walls covered in graffiti including a prominent tiger mural. Trash lines the edges of the walkway, and an overhead pedestrian bridge spans between buildings. Fewer pedestrians are present, with some walking toward the camera from the shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corner with large MARK 24 sign and stairway

events.description: approaching brightly lit MARK 24 neon sign illuminating the area
beginning to ascend concrete stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: approaching stairs and ascending toward a brightly lit upper area with steam vents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing green backpack walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: large bright rectangular sign with MARK 24 text and arrow
wide concrete staircase leading upward to next level
steam rising from ground vents creating atmospheric fog
rounded corner building with bright white and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large glowing MARK 24 sign mounted on a building corner, with steam rising from street vents creating a hazy atmosphere. The camera moves toward and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase, following a pedestrian with a glowing backpack toward a brightly lit upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon market district that gradually transitions into the gritty shadows of back alleys before ascending toward a brightly lit upper level. It begins by weaving through a covered night market where purple and blue neon lights reflect off wet pavement and a glowing beer sign looms over food stalls and pedestrians. As the character steps through a beaded curtain into a dimly lit shop filled with wooden shelves and stacked boxes, the camera briefly lingers in the interior before emerging back into a wide open plaza dominated by holographic advertisements and shimmering puddles. The scene then shifts into a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway characterized by a tiger mural and overhead pedestrian bridges, where the atmosphere grows darker and more secluded. Finally, the camera approaches a large glowing MARK 24 sign amidst rising steam from street vents before ascending a wide concrete staircase toward a luminous upper level.
